entries.text: Egg-laying (Layer) flock support — track daily egg collections on web and mobile, sell eggs by crate, tray or piece, and see egg production and sales trends across your dashboards. Egg sales post automatically to a dedicated Egg Revenue account so your books stay accurate

Test mode — a safe sandbox to explore and train your team. Admins switch between Live and Test from an in-app toggle, with a clear banner showing which you're in, and can seed Test with sample data. Nothing in Test touches your real books: no charges, emails, SMS, WhatsApp, push, bank transfers, or AI usage
Invite your team — admins can invite staff to their workspace straight from the Users page, with branded "Accept invitation" emails and ready-made Secretary and Vet Doctor roles to assign
No ceiling on large transactions — amounts above ₦21.4 million now save correctly across batches, payroll runs and invoices
More accurate financial statements — invoices raised from a farm sale no longer double-count revenue, and money you've advanced to vendors is now tracked separately from money customers owe you
One login for multiple farms — sign in with just your email and password (no workspace name needed) and switch between the businesses you belong to from a single account

FlockPilot on mobile — run your farm from your phone: record flock batches, farm sales and feed receipts; review a batch activity timeline; approve or reject pending farm and finance submissions on the go; and check reports including flock summary, mortality trend, cash flow, cash position and unpaid bills, with a dedicated finance dashboard for finance staff

Business overview on your home screen — a dashboard showing cash on hand, unpaid bills awaiting payment, active flocks and bird counts, staff numbers, pending approvals, and a 6-month revenue-vs-expenses trend at a glance

Invoicing — send branded PDF invoices to customers over WhatsApp, with VAT and Withholding Tax built in. Create one straight from an approved farm sale, and customers can confirm the invoice is genuine before they pay
Treasury — new bank account cards on Funding Events show each account's balance, what's already been reconciled, and let you link payments straight from a bank statement
Sessions & Security — if you lose a phone or share a computer, you can now see every device signed in to your account and sign any of them out from your profile
You can now record a contact as a vendor, a customer, or both — and remove vendors you no longer work with
Customers can now open the invoice verification link without being asked to log in
Login alert emails now show the device, network, and approximate location so you can spot anyone signing in to your account that shouldn't be
Cash flow statement now generates correctly even when items are unclassified
Chat dropdown menus now readable in light mode
Profile, payslips, and notifications pages are now accessible to all team members
Finance status cards now show net liability and credit-noted entries
Trial duration extended from 7 to 14 days
